2606.25996.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
2606.25996.paper_summary: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific practical implementation, Agentic Self-Instruct. We conduct experiments on computer science research tasks, legal reasoning tasks and reasoning with mathematical objects, where we obtain improved results compared to classical synthetic dataset creation methods. Further, meta-optimizing the data scientist agent itself delivers an even larger performance uplift. Agentic data creation provides a way to convert increased inference compute into higher quality model training. Overall, we believe this direction has the potential to change the way we build AI data.
2606.25996.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了Autodata，這是一種通用方法，使AI代理能夠作為數據科學家，構建高質量的訓練和評估數據。<lb/>我們展示了如何訓練（元優化）這樣的數據科學家代理，使其學會創建更強大的數據。<lb/>我們描述了整體的公式，以及一個具體的實用實現，Agentic Self-Instruct。<lb/>我們在計算機科學研究任務、法律推理任務和數學對象推理中進行了實驗，與傳統的合成數據集創建方法相比，我們獲得了更好的結果。<lb/>此外，對數據科學家代理本身進行元優化，帶來了更大的性能提升。<lb/>Agentic數據創建提供了一種將增加的推理計算轉化為更高質量模型訓練的方法。<lb/>總體而言，我們相信這一方向有潛力改變我們構建AI數據的方式。
2606.25996.author: Ilia Kulikov et.al.
2606.25996.authors: Ilia Kulikov, Chenxi Whitehouse, Tianhao Wu, Yixin Nie, Swarnadeep Saha, Eryk Helenowski, Weizhe Yuan, Olga Golovneva, Jack Lanchantin, Yoram Bachrach, Jakob Foerster, Xian Li, Han Fang, Sainbayar Sukhbaatar, Jason Weston
